REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT HARRY COREN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLANITFF TO ALLEGE WHETHER LEASE IS WRITTEN OR ORAL. IF THE LEASE IS WRITTEN, PLAINTIFF IS TO ATTACH A COPY. IF THE LEASE IS ORAL PLAINTIFF IS TO STATE THE TERMS OF THE LEASE. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM AND THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D501/JRM)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501,DEFENDANT HARRY COREN DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF IMPLIED WARRANTY OF HABITABILITY AND THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF COVENANT OF QUIET ENJOYMENT. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF LEASE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B).JUDGE CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: N. WONG, NOT REPORTED (D501)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2019 Continued To Apr-17-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
(650-771-0376) Mark Ruiz for Plaintiff/Moving party .
(818-405-6812) Leslie Hsu for Defendant/opposing party.

ARGUED. Mr. Ruiz stated that he agrees with most of the tentative ruling, after the replu was filed his client was able to locate the lease in it's entirety, that he emailed the lease to opposing counsel yesterday and that he is willing to amend his complaint. Ms. Hsu reported that she has been requesting the lease for a while and that opposing counsel had plenty of time to remedy this error.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT HARRY COREN DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED as to the Second Cause of Action for Breach of Implied Warranty of Habitability and Third Cause of action for Breach of Covenant of Quiet Enjoyment. The Demurrer is SUSTAINED with leave to amend as to the First Cause of Action for Breach of Lease. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-14-2019 Continued To Jan-15-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HARRY COREN'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is CONTINUED on the Court's own motion to January 15, 2019. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2018 Continued To Feb-13-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-15-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D501/JRM)

No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT HARRY COREN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Planitff to allege whether lease is written or oral. If the lease is written, Plaintiff is to attach a copy. If the lease is oral Plaintiff is to state the terms of the lease. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.
